name: Lean Body Mass Calculator
seo_description: Use our free lean body mass calculator (boer) to quickly estimate lbm based on weight, height, gender. No registration needed.
result_context: The mass magra representa tejido no graso; values more altos indican greater musculatura to The weight.
formula_display: Hombre: LBM = 0.407 × weight + 0.267 × height - 19.2; Mujer: LBM = 0.252 × weight + 0.473 × height - 48.3
steps: Ingresa weight in kg and height in cm
The result es mass libre of grasa in kg
mistakes: Confusing mass magra with mass muscular (includes huesos, órganos, water)
Use formula to atleta siendo sedentario (sobreestima LBM)
No Consider hydration (deshidratación reduce LBM aparente)
desc: Free online lean body mass calculator (boer). Enter weight and height to get instant results.
